3136200.name: Kemopop! Soundtrack
3136200.description:
The Kemopop! OST is here! The Kemopop! OST brings you an extended cut of the game’s 128BPM soundtrack, for just over 40 minutes of listening time. This is only for true fans of Kemopop!!

Includes 10 tracks based on the game's soundtrack, and an additional unused theme.

The Kemopop! Soundtrack is available in the following formats:

  • MP3, 256kbps

  • FLAC, 24bit

Enable "Download high-quality audio files" on Steam to download FLAC content.
